title: Measles, mumps and rubella: lab-confirmed cases in England 2025
body: "Previous reports are available:  Measles, mumps and rubella: lab-confirmed cases in England 2024  Measles, mumps and rubella: lab-confirmed cases in England 2023  Measles, mumps and rubella: lab-confirmed cases in England 2022  Measles, mumps and rubella: lab-confirmed cases in England 2021  Earlier reports were published by Public Health England (PHE).  "
